description: Style noteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name, senorita. Subtle pastel hues, super soft footbed styling anf classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Product DetailsBlunt toed sandal with braided thong style synthetic strapsPadded black footbed with a heel patchMini wedge heel (no midsole)TPU outsole with textured patternsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
